TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Corbin Allred kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 5, Corbin Allred, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na pincyogan nya Corbin Allred aring qyanux na squilq psibay maki Utah qalang. mpusal kawas lga,Corbin Allred sangka' pspung na squilq psibay maki Midvale. raral ga,Corbin Allred squilq psibay cingay Mormon ngayal ega'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ¶~ ®orő≤in allre* kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®orő≤in allre*, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. qjanux na pin ¶~ ®jo…£an nja ¶~ ®orő≤in allre* ariŇč qjanux na s~…ēquilq ps~…ēiő≤aj maki utańß qalaŇč. mpus~…ēal kawas~…ē l…£a, ¶~ ®orő≤in allre* s~…ēaŇčka Ē ps~…ēpuŇč na s~…ēquilq ps~…ēiő≤aj maki mi**ale. raral …£a, ¶~ ®orő≤in allre* s~…ēquilq ps~…ēiő≤aj ¶~ ®iŇčaj mormon Ňčajal e…£a Ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
